page.title: Products
page.searchHint: Search by name, description, or barcode; at least {{min}} characters trigger a server query.
page.empty: No products found. Please create products first.

actions.deleteConfirmDescription: The product will be hidden from POS (soft delete). Signed receipts and the RKSV audit trail remain unchanged.
actions.bulkDeactivateDescription: {{count}} active products will be deactivated. They will no longer appear at POS; historical receipts are preserved for audit.
actions.bulkDeactivatePartial: {{deactivated}} deactivated, {{skipped}} already inactive or not found.
actions.deactivateAllDescription: {{count}} active products will be deactivated. Products are not deleted: signed RKSV receipts and the audit trail remain unchanged. You can then re-import a demo menu (with overwrite) if needed.

devPurge.title: Permanently delete product catalog?
devPurge.rksvHintDescription: Products and optionally categories are permanently removed. If TSE-signed receipts exist, development mode automatically retries with override (local only, audit risk).
devPurge.fiscalAutoRetry: TSE-signed receipts detected — retrying with development override…
devPurge.fiscalBlockDescription: This tenant already has TSE-signed payments. A second confirmation is required — local development only, with awareness of audit risk.
devPurge.body: {{count}} product(s) in tenant “{{slug}}” will be permanently deleted.
devPurge.acknowledge: I understand products will be permanently deleted; if TSE receipts exist I accept the development override (local only).
devPurge.acknowledgeFiscalOverride: I accept audit risk and want to delete despite signed receipts (development only).
devPurge.categoriesOnlyHint: No products left; {{count}} category(ies) can still be removed.
devPurge.emptyCatalogHint: Catalog is already empty — the operation will have no effect.

form.name: Product name
form.imageUrlExtra: Recommended: 120 × 120 px, JPG/PNG/WebP. HTTPS URL; leave empty for no image.
form.imageUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
form.imageUploadExtra: Recommended: 120 × 120 px, JPG/PNG/WebP, max. 500 KB. Uploads are center-cropped to a square thumbnail and saved as WebP.
form.imageUploadSaveFirst: Save the product first to upload an image.
form.addonGroupsExtra: Which groups are selectable for this product? Manage add-on products per group under “Add-on groups”.

addonGroups.noneInGroup: No add-on products in this group.
addonGroups.runtimeHint: New sales only use add-on products from this group.
addonGroups.emptyCatalog: No add-on groups. Create groups under “Add-on groups” and add add-on products. Then select which groups appear for this product.
addonGroups.warningItem: The group “{{name}}” has no add-on products. No extras will appear for this group at the POS. Add products under “Add-on groups”.
